pr_body: Adds get_item using a sqlite3 qmark-style parameterized query.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,7 @@
 import sqlite3
+
+
+def get_item(conn, item_id):
+    cur = conn.cursor()
+    cur.execute("SELECT * FROM items WHERE id = ?", (item_id,))
+    return cur.fetchone()
